description: Semantic layer for hotels, resorts, serviced apartments, and hospitality groups. Covers reservations, revenue management, guest experience, and property operations.

entities.name: Reservation
entities.description: A guest's confirmed or tentative booking for accommodation
entities.operational_meaning: Core entity for revenue, occupancy, and guest journey analytics

entities.name: Room
entities.description: A physical accommodation unit available for sale
entities.operational_meaning: Used for occupancy tracking, yield management, and maintenance scheduling

entities.name: Guest
entities.description: Person staying at or interacting with the property
entities.operational_meaning: Drives loyalty analytics, segment performance, and repeat visit tracking

entities.name: Property
entities.description: A physical accommodation property in the portfolio
entities.operational_meaning: Used for multi-property benchmarking, portfolio-level KPIs

entities.name: Rate
entities.description: A priced accommodation offer or contract rate
entities.operational_meaning: Drives rate strategy, channel mix, and revenue optimisation

entities.name: Revenue
entities.description: A financial charge posted against a guest folio
entities.operational_meaning: Used for RevPAR, ADR, TRevPAR, and department revenue analysis

entities.name: Review
entities.description: Guest satisfaction feedback or public review
entities.operational_meaning: Used for reputation management, service recovery, and NPS tracking

vocabulary.definition: Revenue Per Available Room — total room revenue divided by available rooms
Average Daily Rate — average revenue per occupied room
Percentage of available rooms that were sold in a period
Reservation where the guest did not arrive and did not cancel
vocabulary.sql_hint: status IN ('NO_SHOW','NO_ARRIVAL','DNS') OR (check_in_date < CURRENT_DATE AND actual_arrival IS NULL AND status = 'CONFIRMED')

aliases: gross operating profit per available room
vocabulary.definition: Gross Operating Profit Per Available Room — profitability metric across all revenue streams
Rate at which reservations are being booked for a future date compared to prior periods
vocabulary.sql_hint: COUNT(reservations WHERE stay_date BETWEEN x AND y AND booking_date <= reference_date)

vocabulary.definition: Guest checking out before their scheduled departure date
Guest who arrives without a prior reservation
vocabulary.sql_hint: reservation_type IN ('WALKIN','WALK_IN','DIRECT') OR reservation_id IS NULL

suggested_questions: What is the RevPAR trend by property for the last 3 months?
Which room types had the highest ADR this week?
Show me occupancy rate vs last year by month
What is the no-show rate by booking channel this quarter?
Which guests have stayed more than 5 times in the last year?
Show me the pace report for next 30 days vs same period last year
What is the average review score by property this month?
Which booking channels generate the highest RevPAR?

alert_templates.name: Low Occupancy Alert
alert_templates.description: Property occupancy has fallen below the minimum threshold

alert_templates.name: High No-Show Rate
alert_templates.description: No-show rate for upcoming arrivals is elevated
alert_templates.metric_hint: COUNT(status = 'NO_SHOW') / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM reservations WHERE arrival_date = CURRENT_DATE

alert_templates.name: Low Review Score
alert_templates.description: Property review score has dropped below target
alert_templates.metric_hint: AVG(overall_score) FROM reviews WHERE review_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
